allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''C:\\Program Files'',''C:\\Program Files \(x86\)'' -Filter mysql.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 -ExpandProperty FullName")

Bash("$MYSQL" -u root -p123456 -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as ''用户数'' FROM campus_user.users; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as ''角色数'' FROM campus_user.user_roles; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as ''地址数'' FROM campus_user.user_addresses; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as ''钱包数'' FROM campus_user.user_wallets;")

Bash("$MYSQL" -u root -p123456 -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as ''商品数'' FROM campus_product.products; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as ''分类数'' FROM campus_product.product_categories; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as ''点赞数'' FROM campus_product.product_likes; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as ''评论数'' FROM campus_product.product_comments;")

Bash("$MYSQL" -u root -p123456 -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as ''兼职数'' FROM campus_job.jobs; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as ''申请数'' FROM campus_job.job_applications; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as ''分类数'' FROM campus_job.job_categories; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as ''收藏数'' FROM campus_job.job_favorites;")
